name: YandexGPT 5 Pro
archDisplay: Proprietary dense transformer, undisclosed size (YandexGPT 5 flagship)
note: Yandex's closed flagship LLM powering the Alice assistant; vendor claims quality comparable to GPT-4o, with an independent review putting MMLU around 83%.

results.notes: ~3 points below GPT-4o per reviewer's blind comparison

Independent third-party eval (147/164 correct, zero-shot chain-of-thought, English, no translation) from the simple-evals-ru project's results table, which also tests Gigachat, T-Pro, Saiga, Vikhr against the same suite.
Independent third-party eval (216/257 correct) from the simple-evals-ru project's results table.
Independent third-party eval (168/200 correct) from the simple-evals-ru project's results table.
GPQA Diamond, independent third-party eval (89/198 correct) from the simple-evals-ru project's results table.

MATH-500 subset, independent third-party eval (115/200 correct). CAVEAT: the repo author and a Sber/Gigachat release post both flag a known discrepancy between this measured YandexGPT MATH score and Yandex's own official claims, attributed to possible answer-extraction/parsing issues in this specific eval harness rather than the repo mismeasuring other benchmarks -- see reports/errors/math/17_yandexgpt_5_pro.md in the repo for the error analysis.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real release: multiple RU tech press (ppc.world, vc.ru, MashaGPT, Habr/Yandex official post) confirm YandexGPT 5 Pro launched ~2025-02-25 alongside the Alice chat relaunch. Context window corrected/confirmed as 32K (not a stray 256K figure seen in one loose secondary summary) — independently corroborated by llmreference.com ('YandexGPT Pro 5 – 32k context') and datastudios.org, which also confirms the successor 5.1 Pro (released Aug 2025) raised context to 128K, consistent with 5 Pro being 32K. All four independent benchmark rows (MMLU 83, MMLU-Pro 68, DROP-RU 63, IFEval-RU 77) were literally confirmed by direct fetch of the cited habr.com/bothub article text. No corrections made — record verified as accurate.
